---
title: "Nature"
description: "Field notes, seasonal writing, and essays on the non-human world."
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
listing:
  id: nature-listing
  contents:
    - posts
    - "!index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  max-items: 30
  feed: true
---

::: {#nature-listing}
:::
